company_context.open_notes: Code-gen product launching Q3 — AI Act classification open, awaiting outside counsel. B2C content-moderation policies need refresh post-launch. Enterprise deal cycles longer due to AI Act uncertainty. Board escalation for AI Act safety notifications through GC first.
